locations: Sidewalk on the opposite side where Ice cream truck passes
Café for coffee meetup with friend and Stranger's sighting
timeline: Man motions to cross street during traffic lull.
Wife gives Man a scoff about sugar intake from ice cream treat.
Daughter enjoys frozen dessert while avoiding thoughts of the Stranger.
Friend and Man share hour together at café before job departure.
worldFacts: Stranger seen passing by window across from man's friend during coffee meetup
